## Proof checklist
- [ ] `npm run check:banned` passes (staged) or `npm run check:banned:all` passes (full repo)
- [ ] Deployed URL checked in browser (not just terminal 200)
- [ ] Real entity names visible (not placeholders)
- [ ] No `???` / `TBD` / `Unknown Team` / `Unknown Player` / `[object Object]`
- [ ] No lingering skeleton/loading after settle
- [ ] Truthful empty/error states when applicable
- [ ] Deep links checked (box scores, game detail, etc.)
- [ ] Mobile checked if layout changed
- [ ] Screenshot or screen recording attached for UI changes

## Deploy PRs only
- [ ] `npm run audit:prod` passes (optional but recommended)
- [ ] Post-deploy `npm run health` passes
